Get computer training

February 1996
Journalism & Newsroom

NICAR offers multiple computer-assisted reporting training opportunities for journalists, including week-long bootcamps, a broadcast seminar, and a national conference scheduled throughout spring and summer.

Get computer training:

NICAR Bootcamps, week-long intensive training seminars, March 10-15 and May 19-24, Columbia, Mo. NICAR/Medill Broadcast Seminar, March 23-24, Medill School of Journalism, Evanston, Ill. North Carolina Advanced Computer-Assisted Reporting Seminar, May 5-10, Chapel Hill, N.C. National IRE Conference, June 13-16, Convention Center, Providence, R.I.

These dates are open to all journalists. For more information, call NICAR, (314) 882-0684, or send e-mail to nicar@muccmail.missouri.edu.
